title: My Profile
subtitleInternal: Manage your staff profile and emergency details.

identity.nameChangeNotice: First name and last name are managed by support.

external.completenessTitle: Your profile is not complete yet.

messages.completeRequiredFields: Please complete all required fields before saving.
messages.nationalIdRequired: National ID is required for your organization settings.

shippingMark.title: Shipping Mark
shippingMark.description: A short alias the warehouse hand-writes on your packages so they can match cargo to you at a glance. Not a tracking number.
shippingMark.format: 3-20 lowercase letters and digits, starting with a letter.
shippingMark.oneTimeNotice: You can change this once. After saving, only support can edit it.
shippingMark.formatError: Use 3-20 lowercase letters and digits, starting with a letter.
shippingMark.conflictError: Shipping mark already set. Contact support to change it.
